rows.label: qev051512_MSG0001
rows.name:
You really are strong. That is
indeed the power of the one who
broke the curse binding us sisters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I'm sorry for hiding my
identity. There are still many
in this city who hate us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's why I borrowed the form of a
BLADE and entered the tournament.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Come visit us again when you
have free time, alright? She's
been looking incredibly lonely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0005
rows.name:
...No, it's not me, okay? Lyvia...
just really wants to see you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0006
rows.name:
You really are strong. That is indeed the
power that even my mother still fears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0007
rows.name:
...I'm sorry for hiding my
identity. There are still many
in this city who hate us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's why I borrowed the form of a
BLADE and entered the tournament.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's frustrating... but I learned
something huge from this battle.
Someday, I'll gain power like yours, and[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0010
rows.name:
when Mother goes on a rampage, I'll
be able to stop her all by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051512_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Leave it to me. I won't let her
cause trouble for Earthlings anymore.[ST:wait ]
